improvements.proposal: Require telemetry bootstrap code to fail open: wrap exporter initialization in try/except and log explicit warning events instead of risking function startup failure.
Require at least one artifact-backed validation path per acceptance criterion (test, report section, or command) and explicitly flag criteria that need authenticated staging execution.
When optional observability dependencies are imported conditionally, require narrow exception handling (ImportError) plus a diagnostic log event when configuration is skipped.
